name: test-cisco-sw
main_text:
[BLOCK: 1]
hostname {{ hostname }}
!
boot-start-marker
boot-end-marker
!
logging buffered 128000
logging console critical
!
!
!
aaa new-model
!
!
aaa authentication login default local
aaa authorization console
aaa authorization exec default local 
[END_BLOCK: 1]
!
!
!
[BLOCK: 2]
aaa session-id common
clock timezone TMN 5
system mtu routing 1500
no ip source-route
no ip gratuitous-arps
ip icmp rate-limit unreachable 10
!
!
no ip domain-lookup
ip domain-name local
!
!
!
errdisable recovery cause udld
errdisable recovery cause bpduguard
errdisable recovery cause security-violation
errdisable recovery cause channel-misconfig (STP)
errdisable recovery cause pagp-flap
errdisable recovery cause dtp-flap
errdisable recovery cause link-flap
errdisable recovery cause gbic-invalid
errdisable recovery cause psecure-violation
errdisable recovery cause dhcp-rate-limit
errdisable recovery cause vmps
errdisable recovery cause loopback
!
[END_BLOCK: 2]
!
[BLOCK: 3]
!
spanning-tree mode rapid-pvst
spanning-tree logging
spanning-tree portfast bpduguard default
spanning-tree extend system-id
!
vlan internal allocation policy ascending
no lldp tlv-select port-vlan
no lldp tlv-select mac-phy-cfg
lldp run
!
ip ssh version 2
!
!
[END_BLOCK: 3]
[BLOCK: 4]
!
interface FastEthernet0/1
 switchport access vlan {{ access_vlan_number }}
 switchport mode access
 switchport nonegotiate
 switchport voice vlan {{ voice_vlan_number }}
 load-interval 30
 spanning-tree portfast
!
interface FastEthernet0/2
switchport access vlan {{ access_vlan_number }}
 switchport mode access
 switchport nonegotiate
 switchport voice vlan {{ voice_vlan_number }}
 load-interval 30
 spanning-tree portfast
!
interface FastEthernet0/3
switchport access vlan {{ access_vlan_number }}
 switchport mode access
 switchport nonegotiate
 switchport voice vlan {{ voice_vlan_number }}
 load-interval 30
 spanning-tree portfast
!

interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 switchport mode trunk
 switchport nonegotiate
 load-interval 30
!
!
[END_BLOCK: 4]
[BLOCK: 5]
interface Vlan1
 ip address {{ mgmt_ip }} {{ mgmt_mask }}
 no ip route-cache
!
ip default-gateway {{ default_gw_ip }}
no ip http server
no ip http secure-server
!
!
[END_BLOCK: 5]
[BLOCK: 6]
line con 0
line vty 0 4
 exec-timeout 6000 0
 transport input ssh
line vty 5 15
 exec-timeout 6000 0
 transport input ssh
!
ntp clock-period 36029429
ntp server {{ ntp_server }}

[END_BLOCK: 6]
end
